IMB CAMBODIA GROUP

Who We Are?

I.M.B (Cambodia) Group Plc. is based in Phnom Penh Cambodia. We are a professional supplier of advanced EV Fast Charger DC, solar energy system, solar mini grid, lithium battery , carbons battery energy storage systems, solar on grid, solar water pump and solar mobile generators.

VISION
Cambodian and Asian people to living in clean
environment and energy freedom.

MISSION
We provide high quality clean renewable energy
products, technology and services to all customers with accountability.

GOAL
Our clients received products, service high quality
more than expectation with love, respect, and good after sale services.

About Us

I.M.B (Cambodia) Group Plc. is based in Phnom Penh Cambodia. We are a professional supplier of advanced solar energy system, lithium battery , carbons battery energy storage systems, solar on grid, mini grid, solar water pump and solar mobile generators.
